title: 98.css
excerpt: A design system for building faithful recreations of old UIs.
content_html:
A design system for building faithful recreations of old UIs.

Intro

98.css is a CSS library for building interfaces that look like Windows 98. See more on GitHub.

My First VB4 Program

Hello, world!

This library relies on the usage of semantic HTML. To make a button, you'll need to use a <button>. Input elements require labels. Icon buttons rely on aria-label. This page will guide you through that process, but accessibility is a primary goal of this project.

You can override many of the styles of your elements while maintaining the appearance provided by this library. Need more padding on your buttons? Go for it. Need to add some color to your input labels? Be our guest.

This library does not contain any JavaScript, it merely styles your HTML with some CSS. This means 98.css is compatible with your frontend framework of choice.

Here is an example of 98.css used with React, and an example with vanilla JavaScript. The fastest way to use 98.css is to import it from unpkg. 

<link
  rel="stylesheet"
  href="https://unpkg.com/98.css"
>

You can install 98.css from the GitHub releases page, or from npm. 

npm install 98.css

Components

Button

A command button, also referred to as a push button, is a control that causes the application to perform some action when the user clicks it.

A standard button measures 75px wide and 23px tall, with a raised outer and inner border. They are given 12px of horizontal padding by default.

Show code 
<button>Click me</button>
<input type="submit" />
<input type="reset" />

You can add the class default to any button to apply additional styling, useful when communicating to the user what default action would happen in the active window if the Enter key was pressed on Windows 98.

Show code 
<button class="default">OK</button>

When buttons are clicked, the raised borders become sunken. The following button is simulated to be in the pressed (active) state.

Show code 
<button>I am being pressed</button>

Disabled buttons maintain the same raised border, but have a "washed out" appearance in their label.

Show code 
<button disabled>I cannot be clicked</button>

Button focus is communicated with a dotted border, set 4px within the contents of the button. The following example is simulated to be focused.

Show code 
<button>I am focused</button>

Checkbox

A check box represents an independent or non-exclusive choice.

Checkboxes are represented with a sunken panel, populated with a "check" icon when selected, next to a label indicating the choice.

Note: You must include a corresponding label after your checkbox, using the <label> element with a for attribute pointed at the id of your input. This ensures the checkbox is easy to use with assistive technologies, on top of ensuring a good user experience for all (navigating with the tab key, being able to click the entire label to select the box).

Show code 
<input type="checkbox" id="example1">
<label for="example1">This is a checkbox</label>

Checkboxes can be selected and disabled with the standard checked and disabled attributes.

When grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class. This ensures a consistent spacing between inputs.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked type="checkbox" id="example2">
  <label for="example2">I am checked</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input disabled type="checkbox" id="example3">
  <label for="example3">I am inactive</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked disabled type="checkbox" id="example4">
  <label for="example4">I am inactive but still checked</label>
</div>

OptionButton

An option button, also referred to as a radio button, represents a single choice within a limited set of mutually exclusive choices. That is, the user can choose only one set of options.

Option buttons can be used via the radio type on an input element.

Option buttons can be grouped by specifying a shared name attribute on each input. Just as before: when grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class to ensure a consistent spacing between inputs.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio5" type="radio" name="first-example">
  <label for="radio5">Yes</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio6" type="radio" name="first-example">
  <label for="radio6">No</label>
</div>

Option buttons can also be checked and disabled with their corresponding HTML attributes.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio7" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio7">Peanut butter should be smooth</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked disabled id="radio8" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio8">I understand why people like crunchy peanut butter</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input disabled id="radio9" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio9">Crunchy peanut butter is good</label>
</div>

GroupBox

A group box is a special control you can use to organize a set of controls. A group box is a rectangular frame with an optional label that surrounds a set of controls.

A group box can be used by wrapping your elements with the fieldset tag. It contains a sunken outer border and a raised inner border, resembling an engraved box around your controls.

Show code 
<fieldset>
  <div class="field-row">Select one:</div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio10" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio10">Diners</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio11" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio11">Drive-Ins</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio12" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio12">Dives</label>
  </div>
</fieldset>

You can provide your group with a label by placing a legend element within the fieldset.

Show code 
<fieldset>
  <legend>Today's mood</legend>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio13" type="radio" name="fieldset-example2">
    <label for="radio13">Claire Saffitz</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio14" type="radio" name="fieldset-example2">
    <label for="radio14">Brad Leone</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio15" type="radio" name="fieldset-example2">
    <label for="radio15">Chris Morocco</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio16" type="radio" name="fieldset-example2">
    <label for="radio16">Carla Lalli Music</label>
  </div>
</fieldset>

TextBox

A text box (also referred to as an edit control) is a rectangular control where the user enters or edits text. It can be defined to support a single line or multiple lines of text.

Text boxes can rendered by specifying a text type on an input element. As with checkboxes and radio buttons, you should provide a corresponding label with a properly set for attribute, and wrap both in a container with the field-row class.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <label for="text17">Occupation</label>
  <input id="text17" type="text" />
</div>

Additionally, you can make use of the field-row-stacked class to position your label above the input instead of beside it.

Show code 
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text18">Address (Line 1)</label>
  <input id="text18" type="text" />
</div>
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text19">Address (Line 2)</label>
  <input id="text19" type="text" />
</div>

To support multiple lines in the user's input, use the textarea element instead.

Show code 
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text20">Additional notes</label>
  <textarea id="text20" rows="8"></textarea>
</div>

Text boxes can also be disabled and have value with their corresponding HTML attributes.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <label for="text21">Favorite color</label>
  <input id="text21" disabled type="text" value="Windows Green"/>
</div>

Slider

A slider, sometimes called a trackbar control, consists of a bar that defines the extent or range of the adjustment and an indicator that shows the current value for the control...

Sliders can rendered by specifying a range type on an input element.

Show code 
<div class="field-row" style="width: 300px">
  <label for="range22">Volume:</label>
  <label for="range23">Low</label>
  <input id="range23" type="range" min="1" max="11" value="5" />
  <label for="range24">High</label>
</div>

You can make use of the has-box-indicator class replace the default indicator with a box indicator, furthermore the slider can be wrapped with a div using is-vertical to display the input vertically.

Note: To change the length of a vertical slider, the input width and div height.

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <label for="range25">Cowbell</label>
  <div class="is-vertical">
    <input id="range25" class="has-box-indicator" type="range" min="1" max="3" step="1" value="2" />
  </div>
</div>

Dropdown

A drop-down list box allows the selection of only a single item from a list. In its closed state, the control displays the current value for the control. The user opens the list to change the value.

Dropdowns can be rendered by using the select and option elements.

Show code 
<select>
  <option>5 - Incredible!</option>
  <option>4 - Great!</option>
  <option>3 - Pretty good</option>
  <option>2 - Not so great</option>
  <option>1 - Unfortunate</option>
</select>

By default, the first option will be selected. You can change this by giving one of your option elements the selected attribute.

Show code 
<select>
  <option>5 - Incredible!</option>
  <option>4 - Great!</option>
  <option selected>3 - Pretty good</option>
  <option>2 - Not so great</option>
  <option>1 - Unfortunate</option>
</select>

Window

The following components illustrate how to build complete windows using 98.css.

Title Bar

At the top edge of the window, inside its border, is the title bar (also reffered to as the caption or caption bar), which extends across the width of the window. The title bar identifies the contents of the window.
Include command buttons associated with the common commands of the primary window in the title bar. These buttons act as shortcuts to specific window commands.

You can build a complete title bar by making use of three classes, title-bar, title-bar-text, and title-bar-controls.

A Title Bar

Show code 
<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Title Bar</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

We make use of aria-label to render the Close button, to let assistive technologies know the intent of this button. You may also use "Minimize", "Maximize", "Restore" and "Help" like so:

A Title Bar


A Maximized Title Bar


A Helpful Bar

Show code 
<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Title Bar</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Minimize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Maximize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

<br />

<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Maximized Title Bar</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Minimize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Restore"></button>
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

<br />

<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Helpful Bar</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Help"></button>
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

Each aria-label also has a corresponding styling class to render the title bar buttons, to let the aria-label text be in other languages without causing rendering, accessibility, or localization issues.

A Title Bar using Button Styling Classes


A Maximized Title Bar using Button Styling Classes


A Helpful Bar using Button Styling Classes

Show code 
<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Title Bar using Button Styling Classes</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="minimize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="maximize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

<br />

<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Maximized Title Bar using Button Styling Classes</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="minimize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="restore"></button>
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

<br />

<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Helpful Bar using Button Styling Classes</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="help"></button>
    <button aria-label="Any Text" class="close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

Maximize buttons can be disabled, useful when making a window appear as if it cannot be maximized.

A Title Bar with Maximize disabled

Show code 
<div class="title-bar">
  <div class="title-bar-text">A Title Bar with Maximize disabled</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Minimize"></button>
    <button aria-label="Maximize" disabled></button>
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

You can make a title bar "inactive" by adding inactive class, useful when making more than one window.

An inactive title bar

Show code 
<div class="title-bar inactive">
  <div class="title-bar-text">An inactive title bar</div>
  <div class="title-bar-controls">
    <button aria-label="Close"></button>
  </div>
</div>

Window contents

Every window has a boundary that defines its shape.

To give our title bar a home, we make use of the window class. This provides a raised outer and inner border, as well as some padding. We can freely resize the window by specifying a width in the container style.

A Complete Window

Show code 
<div class="window" style="width: 300px">
  <div class="title-bar">
    <div class="title-bar-text">A Complete Window</div>
    <div class="title-bar-controls">
      <button aria-label="Minimize"></button>
      <button aria-label="Maximize"></button>
      <button aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

To draw the contents of the window, we use the window-body class under the title bar.

A Window With Stuff In It

There's so much room for activities!

Show code 
<div class="window" style="width: 300px">
  <div class="title-bar">
    <div class="title-bar-text">A Window With Stuff In It</div>
    <div class="title-bar-controls">
      <button aria-label="Minimize"></button>
      <button aria-label="Maximize"></button>
      <button aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="window-body">
    <p>There's so much room for activities!</p>
  </div>
</div>

Status Bar

A status bar is a special area within a window, typically the bottom, that displays information about the current state of what is being viewed in the window or any other contextual information, such as keyboard state.

You can render a status bar with the status-bar class, and status-bar-field for every child text element.

A Window With A Status Bar

There are just so many possibilities:

  • A Task Manager
  • A Notepad
  • Or even a File Explorer!

Press F1 for help

Slide 1

CPU Usage: 14%

Show code 
<div class="window" style="width: 320px">
  <div class="title-bar">
    <div class="title-bar-text">A Window With A Status Bar</div>
  </div>
  <div class="window-body">
<p> There are just so many possibilities:</p>
<ul>
    <li>A Task Manager</li>
    <li>A Notepad</li>
    <li>Or even a File Explorer!</li>
</ul>
  </div>
  <div class="status-bar">
    <p class="status-bar-field">Press F1 for help</p>
    <p class="status-bar-field">Slide 1</p>
    <p class="status-bar-field">CPU Usage: 14%</p>
  </div>
</div>

TreeView

A tree view control is a special list box control that displays a set of objects as an indented outline based on their logical hierarchical relationship.

To render a tree view, use an ul element with the tree-view class. The children of this list (li elements), can contain whatever you'd like.

  • We can put
  • ✨ Whatever ✨
  • We want in here
Show code 
<ul class="tree-view">
  <li>We can put</li>
  <li><strong style="color: purple">✨ Whatever ✨</strong></li>
  <li>We want in here</li>
</ul>

To make this a tree, we can nest further ul elements (no class needed on these). This will provide them with a nice dotted border and indentation to illustrate the structure of the tree.

To create expandable sections, wrap child lists inside of details elements.

        </li>

    </details>
  </li>
  <li>HTML</li>

Tabs

A tab control is analogous to a divider in a file cabinet or notebook. You can use this control to define multiple logical pages or sections of information within the same window.

To render a tab list, use a menu element with the [role=tablist] attribute. The children of this menu (li elements), should get a [role=tab] attribute.

Tabs should be managed by adding custom javascript code. All you need is to add the [aria-selected=true] attribute to the active tab.

Hello, world!

  • Desktop
  • My computer
  • Control panel
  • Devices manager
  • Hardware profiles
  • Performance

    the tab content

    Show code 
    <div class="window-body">
  <p>Hello, world!</p>

  <menu role="tablist">
    <li role="tab" aria-selected="true"><a href="#tabs">Desktop</a></li>
    <li role="tab"><a href="#tabs">My computer</a></li>
    <li role="tab"><a href="#tabs">Control panel</a></li>
    <li role="tab"><a href="#tabs">Devices manager</a></li>
    <li role="tab"><a href="#tabs">Hardware profiles</a></li>
    <li role="tab"><a href="#tabs">Performance</a></li>
  </menu>
  <div class="window" role="tabpanel">
    <div class="window-body">
      <p>the tab content</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

    TableView

    To render a table view, use a table element. Wrap it with a div element with sunken-panel class to provide proper border and overflow container.

    With a bit of extra scripting you can make table view interactive. Give interactive class to table element to show pointer cursor when hovering over body rows. Table rows can be given highlighted class to appear selected.

<script>
  document.querySelectorAll('table.interactive').forEach(element => {
    element.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
      const highlightedClass = 'highlighted';
      const isRow = element => element.tagName === 'TR' && element.parentElement.tagName === 'TBODY';
      const newlySelectedRow = event.composedPath().find(isRow);
      const previouslySelectedRow = Array.from(newlySelectedRow.parentElement.children).filter(isRow).find(element => element.classList.contains(highlightedClass));
      if(previouslySelectedRow){
        previouslySelectedRow.classList.toggle(highlightedClass);
      }

      if (newlySelectedRow) {
        newlySelectedRow.classList.toggle(highlightedClass);
      }
    })
  });
</script>

    Progress Indicator

    You can use a progress indicator, also known as a progress bar control, to show the percentage of completion of a lengthy operation.

    There are two types of progress bars: solid and segmented. The solid version is the default. To declare a segmented bar, you should use the segmented class.

    Show code 
    <div class="progress-indicator">
  <span class="progress-indicator-bar"  style="width: 40%;" />
</div>
    Show code 
    <div class="progress-indicator segmented">
  <span class="progress-indicator-bar" style="width: 40%;" />
</div>

    Field borders

    Text boxes, check boxes, drop-down list boxes, spin boxes and list boxes use the field border style. You can also use the style for define the work area within a window. It uses the sunken outer and sunken inner basic border styles. For most controls, the interior of the field uses the button highlight color. For text fields, such as text boxes and combo boxes, the interior uses the button face color when the field is read-only or disabled.
    Status fields use the status field border style. This style uses only the sunken outer basic border style. You use the status field style in status bars and other read-only fields where the content of the file can change dynamically.

    As mentioned in these guidelines, these styles are used in other contexts than just form elements and status fields such as to indicate work areas and dynamic content. For that reason, we provide three classes for these generic usages, field-border, field-border-disabled, and status-field-border. These classes only define the border and background color and minimal padding, so you will typically need to at least provide some extra padding yourself.

    Work area

    Show code 
    <div class="field-border" style="padding: 8px">
  Work area
</div>

    Disabled work area

    Show code 
    <div class="field-border-disabled" style="padding: 8px">
  Disabled work area
</div>

    Dynamic content

    Show code 
    <div class="status-field-border" style="padding: 8px">
  Dynamic content
</div>

    Refer to the GitHub issues page to see bugs in my CSS or report new ones. I'd really like to see your pull requests (especially those new to open-source!) and will happily provide code review. 98.css is a fun, silly project and I'd like to make it a fun place to build your open-source muscle.

    Thank you for checking my little project out, I hope it brought you some joy today. Consider starring/following along on GitHub and maybe subscribing to more fun things on my twitter. 👋

blocks.html_en: A design system for building faithful recreations of old UIs.

sentences.en: A design system for building faithful recreations of old UIs.
sentences.zh: 用于构建旧 UI 的忠实再现的设计系统。

blocks.html_en: 98.css is a CSS library for building interfaces that look like Windows 98. See more on GitHub.

sentences.en: 98.css is a CSS library for building interfaces that look like Windows 98.
sentences.zh: 98.css 是一个 CSS 库，用于构建类似于 Windows 98 的界面。

sentences.en: See more on GitHub.
sentences.zh: 在 GitHub 上查看更多内容。

sentences.en: My First VB4 Program
sentences.zh: 我的第一个 VB4 程序

sentences.en: Hello, world!
sentences.zh: 你好世界！

blocks.html_en: This library relies on the usage of semantic HTML. To make a button, you'll need to use a <button>. Input elements require labels. Icon buttons rely on aria-label. This page will guide you through that process, but accessibility is a primary goal of this project.

sentences.en: This library relies on the usage of semantic HTML.
sentences.zh: 该库依赖于语义 HTML 的使用。

sentences.en: To make a button, you'll need to use a <button>.
sentences.zh: 要制作按钮，您需要使用 <button>。

sentences.en: Input elements require labels.
sentences.zh: 输入元素需要标签。

sentences.en: Icon buttons rely on aria-label.
sentences.zh: 图标按钮依赖于 aria-label。

sentences.en: This page will guide you through that process, but accessibility is a primary goal of this project.
sentences.zh: 本页面将引导您完成该过程，但可访问性是该项目的主要目标。

blocks.html_en: You can override many of the styles of your elements while maintaining the appearance provided by this library. Need more padding on your buttons? Go for it. Need to add some color to your input labels? Be our guest.

sentences.en: You can override many of the styles of your elements while maintaining the appearance provided by this library.
sentences.zh: 您可以覆盖元素的许多样式，同时保持此库提供的外观。

sentences.en: Need more padding on your buttons?
sentences.zh: 您的按钮需要更多填充吗？

sentences.en: Go for it.
sentences.zh: 大胆试试吧。

sentences.en: Need to add some color to your input labels?
sentences.zh: 需要为您的输入标签添加一些颜色吗？

sentences.en: Be our guest.
sentences.zh: 成为我们的客人。

blocks.html_en: This library does not contain any JavaScript, it merely styles your HTML with some CSS. This means 98.css is compatible with your frontend framework of choice.

sentences.en: This library does not contain any JavaScript, it merely styles your HTML with some CSS.
sentences.zh: 这个库不包含任何 JavaScript，它只是使用一些 CSS 来设置 HTML 的样式。

sentences.en: This means 98.css is compatible with your frontend framework of choice.
sentences.zh: 这意味着 98.css 与您选择的前端框架兼容。

blocks.html_en: Here is an example of 98.css used with React, and an example with vanilla JavaScript. The fastest way to use 98.css is to import it from unpkg.

sentences.en: Here is an example of 98.css used with React, and an example with vanilla JavaScript.
sentences.zh: 这是与 React 一起使用的 98.css 示例，以及与普通 JavaScript 一起使用的示例。

sentences.en: The fastest way to use 98.css is to import it from unpkg.
sentences.zh: 使用 98.css 最快的方法是从 unpkg 导入它。

blocks.html_en: You can install 98.css from the GitHub releases page, or from npm.

sentences.en: You can install 98.css from the GitHub releases page, or from npm.
sentences.zh: 您可以从 GitHub 发布页面或 npm 安装 98.css。

sentences.en: Components
sentences.zh: 成分

sentences.en: Button
sentences.zh: 按钮

blocks.html_en: A command button, also referred to as a push button, is a control that causes the application to perform some action when the user clicks it.

sentences.en: A command button, also referred to as a push button, is a control that causes the application to perform some action when the user clicks it.
sentences.zh: 命令按钮也称为下压按钮，是一种当用户单击它时使应用程序执行某些操作的控件。

blocks.html_en: A standard button measures 75px wide and 23px tall, with a raised outer and inner border. They are given 12px of horizontal padding by default.

sentences.en: A standard button measures 75px wide and 23px tall, with a raised outer and inner border.
sentences.zh: 标准按钮宽 75 像素，高 23 像素，具有凸起的外边框和内边框。

sentences.en: They are given 12px of horizontal padding by default.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，它们的水平内边距为 12 像素。

blocks.html_en: You can add the class default to any button to apply additional styling, useful when communicating to the user what default action would happen in the active window if the Enter key was pressed on Windows 98.

sentences.en: You can add the class default to any button to apply additional styling, useful when communicating to the user what default action would happen in the active window if the Enter key was pressed on Windows 98.
sentences.zh: 您可以将类默认值添加到任何按钮以应用附加样式，这在向用户传达如果在 Windows 98 上按下 Enter 键时在活动窗口中将发生什么默认操作时非常有用。

blocks.html_en: When buttons are clicked, the raised borders become sunken. The following button is simulated to be in the pressed (active) state.

sentences.en: When buttons are clicked, the raised borders become sunken.
sentences.zh: 单击按钮时，凸起的边框会凹陷。

sentences.en: The following button is simulated to be in the pressed (active) state.
sentences.zh: 以下按钮被模拟为处于按下（活动）状态。

blocks.html_en: Disabled buttons maintain the same raised border, but have a "washed out" appearance in their label.

sentences.en: Disabled buttons maintain the same raised border, but have a "washed out" appearance in their label.
sentences.zh: 禁用按钮保持相同的凸起边框，但其标签具有“褪色”外观。

blocks.html_en: Button focus is communicated with a dotted border, set 4px within the contents of the button. The following example is simulated to be focused.

sentences.en: Button focus is communicated with a dotted border, set 4px within the contents of the button.
sentences.zh: 按钮焦点通过虚线边框进行传达，在按钮内容内设置 4px。

sentences.en: The following example is simulated to be focused.
sentences.zh: 下面模拟一下例子来重点说明一下。

sentences.en: Checkbox
sentences.zh: 复选框

blocks.html_en: A check box represents an independent or non-exclusive choice.

sentences.en: A check box represents an independent or non-exclusive choice.
sentences.zh: 复选框代表独立或非排他性的选择。

blocks.html_en: Checkboxes are represented with a sunken panel, populated with a "check" icon when selected, next to a label indicating the choice.

sentences.en: Checkboxes are represented with a sunken panel, populated with a "check" icon when selected, next to a label indicating the choice.
sentences.zh: 复选框用凹陷面板表示，选择时会填充一个“检查”图标，旁边有一个指示选择的标签。

blocks.html_en: Note: You must include a corresponding label after your checkbox, using the <label> element with a for attribute pointed at the id of your input. This ensures the checkbox is easy to use with assistive technologies, on top of ensuring a good user experience for all (navigating with the tab key, being able to click the entire label to select the box).

sentences.en: Note: You must include a corresponding label after your checkbox, using the <label> element with a for attribute pointed at the id of your input.
sentences.zh: 注意：您必须在复选框后包含相应的标签，使用 <label> 元素以及指向输入 id 的 for 属性。

sentences.en: This ensures the checkbox is easy to use with assistive technologies, on top of ensuring a good user experience for all (navigating with the tab key, being able to click the entire label to select the box).
sentences.zh: 这确保了复选框易于与辅助技术一起使用，同时确保为所有人提供良好的用户体验（使用 Tab 键导航，能够单击整个标签来选择该框）。

sentences.en: This is a checkbox
sentences.zh: 这是一个复选框

blocks.html_en: Checkboxes can be selected and disabled with the standard checked and disabled attributes.

sentences.en: Checkboxes can be selected and disabled with the standard checked and disabled attributes.
sentences.zh: 可以使用标准的选中和禁用属性来选择和禁用复选框。

blocks.html_en: When grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class. This ensures a consistent spacing between inputs.

sentences.en: When grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class.
sentences.zh: 对输入进行分组时，将每个输入包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中。

sentences.en: This ensures a consistent spacing between inputs.
sentences.zh: 这确保了输入之间的间距一致。

sentences.en: I am checked
sentences.zh: 我被检查了

sentences.en: I am inactive
sentences.zh: 我不活跃

sentences.en: I am inactive but still checked
sentences.zh: 我不活跃但仍检查过

sentences.en: OptionButton
sentences.zh: 选项按钮

blocks.html_en: An option button, also referred to as a radio button, represents a single choice within a limited set of mutually exclusive choices. That is, the user can choose only one set of options.

sentences.en: An option button, also referred to as a radio button, represents a single choice within a limited set of mutually exclusive choices.
sentences.zh: 选项按钮（也称为单选按钮）表示一组有限的互斥选项中的单个选项。

sentences.en: That is, the user can choose only one set of options.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，用户只能选择一组选项。

blocks.html_en: Option buttons can be used via the radio type on an input element.

sentences.en: Option buttons can be used via the radio type on an input element.
sentences.zh: 选项按钮可以通过输入元素上的单选类型来使用。

blocks.html_en: Option buttons can be grouped by specifying a shared name attribute on each input. Just as before: when grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class to ensure a consistent spacing between inputs.

sentences.en: Option buttons can be grouped by specifying a shared name attribute on each input.
sentences.zh: 可以通过在每个输入上指定共享名称属性来对选项按钮进行分组。

sentences.en: Just as before: when grouping inputs, wrap each input in a container with the field-row class to ensure a consistent spacing between inputs.
sentences.zh: 就像以前一样：对输入进行分组时，将每个输入包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中，以确保输入之间的间距一致。

blocks.html_en: Option buttons can also be checked and disabled with their corresponding HTML attributes.

sentences.en: Option buttons can also be checked and disabled with their corresponding HTML attributes.
sentences.zh: 选项按钮也可以通过其相应的 HTML 属性进行检查和禁用。

sentences.en: Peanut butter should be smooth
sentences.zh: 花生酱应该是光滑的

sentences.en: I understand why people like crunchy peanut butter
sentences.zh: 我明白为什么人们喜欢脆脆的花生酱

sentences.en: Crunchy peanut butter is good
sentences.zh: 脆脆的花生酱也不错

sentences.en: GroupBox
sentences.zh: 分组框

blocks.html_en: A group box is a special control you can use to organize a set of controls. A group box is a rectangular frame with an optional label that surrounds a set of controls.

sentences.en: A group box is a special control you can use to organize a set of controls.
sentences.zh: 组框是一种特殊的控件，可用于组织一组控件。

sentences.en: A group box is a rectangular frame with an optional label that surrounds a set of controls.
sentences.zh: 组框是一个矩形框架，带有围绕一组控件的可选标签。

blocks.html_en: A group box can be used by wrapping your elements with the fieldset tag. It contains a sunken outer border and a raised inner border, resembling an engraved box around your controls.

sentences.en: A group box can be used by wrapping your elements with the fieldset tag.
sentences.zh: 可以通过使用 fieldset 标签包装元素来使用组框。

sentences.en: It contains a sunken outer border and a raised inner border, resembling an engraved box around your controls.
sentences.zh: 它包含一个凹陷的外边框和一个凸起的内边框，类似于控件周围的雕刻框。

blocks.html_en: You can provide your group with a label by placing a legend element within the fieldset.

sentences.en: You can provide your group with a label by placing a legend element within the fieldset.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过在字段集中放置图例元素来为您的组提供标签。

sentences.en: TextBox
sentences.zh: 文本框

blocks.html_en: A text box (also referred to as an edit control) is a rectangular control where the user enters or edits text. It can be defined to support a single line or multiple lines of text.

sentences.en: A text box (also referred to as an edit control) is a rectangular control where the user enters or edits text.
sentences.zh: 文本框（也称为编辑控件）是用户输入或编辑文本的矩形控件。

sentences.en: It can be defined to support a single line or multiple lines of text.
sentences.zh: 它可以被定义为支持单行或多行文本。

blocks.html_en: Text boxes can rendered by specifying a text type on an input element. As with checkboxes and radio buttons, you should provide a corresponding label with a properly set for attribute, and wrap both in a container with the field-row class.

sentences.en: Text boxes can rendered by specifying a text type on an input element.
sentences.zh: 可以通过在输入元素上指定文本类型来呈现文本框。

sentences.en: As with checkboxes and radio buttons, you should provide a corresponding label with a properly set for attribute, and wrap both in a container with the field-row class.
sentences.zh: 与复选框和单选按钮一样，您应该提供一个具有正确设置的属性的相应标签，并将两者包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中。

sentences.en: Occupation
sentences.zh: 职业

blocks.html_en: Additionally, you can make use of the field-row-stacked class to position your label above the input instead of beside it.

sentences.en: Additionally, you can make use of the field-row-stacked class to position your label above the input instead of beside it.
sentences.zh: 此外，您可以使用 field-row-stacked 类将标签放置在输入上方而不是旁边。

sentences.en: Address (Line 1)
sentences.zh: 地址第一行）

sentences.en: Address (Line 2)
sentences.zh: 地址（第 2 行）

blocks.html_en: To support multiple lines in the user's input, use the textarea element instead.

sentences.en: To support multiple lines in the user's input, use the textarea element instead.
sentences.zh: 要支持用户输入中的多行，请改用 textarea 元素。

sentences.en: Additional notes
sentences.zh: 附加说明

blocks.html_en: Text boxes can also be disabled and have value with their corresponding HTML attributes.

sentences.en: Text boxes can also be disabled and have value with their corresponding HTML attributes.
sentences.zh: 文本框也可以被禁用并具有其相应 HTML 属性的值。

sentences.en: Favorite color
sentences.zh: 最喜欢的颜色

sentences.en: Slider
sentences.zh: 滑块

blocks.html_en: A slider, sometimes called a trackbar control, consists of a bar that defines the extent or range of the adjustment and an indicator that shows the current value for the control...

sentences.en: A slider, sometimes called a trackbar control, consists of a bar that defines the extent or range of the adjustment and an indicator that shows the current value for the control...
sentences.zh: 滑块有时称为轨迹栏控件，由定义调整程度或范围的条和显示控件当前值的指示器组成...

blocks.html_en: Sliders can rendered by specifying a range type on an input element.

sentences.en: Sliders can rendered by specifying a range type on an input element.
sentences.zh: 可以通过在输入元素上指定范围类型来呈现滑块。

sentences.en: Volume: Low High
sentences.zh: 成交量：低 高

blocks.html_en: You can make use of the has-box-indicator class replace the default indicator with a box indicator, furthermore the slider can be wrapped with a div using is-vertical to display the input vertically.

sentences.en: You can make use of the has-box-indicator class replace the default indicator with a box indicator, furthermore the slider can be wrapped with a div using is-vertical to display the input vertically.
sentences.zh: 您可以使用 has-box-indicator 类将默认指示器替换为框指示器，此外，可以使用 is-vertical 用 div 包裹滑块以垂直显示输入。

blocks.html_en: Note: To change the length of a vertical slider, the input width and div height.

sentences.en: Note: To change the length of a vertical slider, the input width and div height.
sentences.zh: 注意：要更改垂直滑块的长度，请输入宽度和 div 高度。

sentences.en: Cowbell
sentences.zh: 考贝尔

sentences.en: Dropdown
sentences.zh: 下拉菜单

blocks.html_en: A drop-down list box allows the selection of only a single item from a list. In its closed state, the control displays the current value for the control. The user opens the list to change the value.

sentences.en: A drop-down list box allows the selection of only a single item from a list.
sentences.zh: 下拉列表框允许仅从列表中选择单个项目。

sentences.en: In its closed state, the control displays the current value for the control.
sentences.zh: 在关闭状态下，控件显示控件的当前值。

sentences.en: The user opens the list to change the value.
sentences.zh: 用户打开列表来更改值。

blocks.html_en: Dropdowns can be rendered by using the select and option elements.

sentences.en: Dropdowns can be rendered by using the select and option elements.
sentences.zh: 可以使用 select 和 option 元素呈现下拉菜单。

blocks.html_en: By default, the first option will be selected. You can change this by giving one of your option elements the selected attribute.

sentences.en: By default, the first option will be selected.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，将选择第一个选项。

sentences.en: You can change this by giving one of your option elements the selected attribute.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过为选项元素之一指定选定的属性来更改此设置。

sentences.en: Window
sentences.zh: 窗户

blocks.html_en: The following components illustrate how to build complete windows using 98.css.

sentences.en: The following components illustrate how to build complete windows using 98.css.
sentences.zh: 以下组件说明了如何使用 98.css 构建完整的窗口。

sentences.en: Title Bar
sentences.zh: 标题栏

blocks.html_en: At the top edge of the window, inside its border, is the title bar (also reffered to as the caption or caption bar), which extends across the width of the window. The title bar identifies the contents of the window.

sentences.en: At the top edge of the window, inside its border, is the title bar (also reffered to as the caption or caption bar), which extends across the width of the window.
sentences.zh: 标题栏位于窗口顶部边缘的边框内部（也称为标题或标题栏），它延伸到窗口的宽度。

sentences.en: The title bar identifies the contents of the window.
sentences.zh: 标题栏标识窗口的内容。

blocks.html_en: Include command buttons associated with the common commands of the primary window in the title bar. These buttons act as shortcuts to specific window commands.

sentences.en: Include command buttons associated with the common commands of the primary window in the title bar.
sentences.zh: 在标题栏中包含与主窗口的常用命令关联的命令按钮。

sentences.en: These buttons act as shortcuts to specific window commands.
sentences.zh: 这些按钮充当特定窗口命令的快捷方式。

blocks.html_en: You can build a complete title bar by making use of three classes, title-bar, title-bar-text, and title-bar-controls.

sentences.en: You can build a complete title bar by making use of three classes, title-bar, title-bar-text, and title-bar-controls.
sentences.zh: 您可以使用三个类（标题栏、标题栏文本和标题栏控件）构建完整的标题栏。

sentences.en: A Title Bar
sentences.zh: 标题栏

blocks.html_en: We make use of aria-label to render the Close button, to let assistive technologies know the intent of this button. You may also use "Minimize", "Maximize", "Restore" and "Help" like so:

sentences.en: We make use of aria-label to render the Close button, to let assistive technologies know the intent of this button.
sentences.zh: 我们使用 aria-label 来渲染关闭按钮，让辅助技术知道这个按钮的意图。

sentences.en: You may also use "Minimize", "Maximize", "Restore" and "Help" like so:
sentences.zh: 您还可以使用“最小化”、“最大化”、“恢复”和“帮助”，如下所示：

sentences.en: A Title Bar
sentences.zh: 标题栏

sentences.en: A Maximized Title Bar
sentences.zh: 最大化的标题栏

sentences.en: A Helpful Bar
sentences.zh: 一个有用的酒吧

blocks.html_en: Each aria-label also has a corresponding styling class to render the title bar buttons, to let the aria-label text be in other languages without causing rendering, accessibility, or localization issues.

sentences.en: Each aria-label also has a corresponding styling class to render the title bar buttons, to let the aria-label text be in other languages without causing rendering, accessibility, or localization issues.
sentences.zh: 每个 aria-label 还具有相应的样式类来呈现标题栏按钮，以便让 aria-label 文本采用其他语言，而不会导致呈现、可访问性或本地化问题。

blocks.html_en: A Title Bar using Button Styling Classes

sentences.en: A Title Bar using Button Styling Classes
sentences.zh: 使用按钮样式类的标题栏

blocks.html_en: A Maximized Title Bar using Button Styling Classes

sentences.en: A Maximized Title Bar using Button Styling Classes
sentences.zh: 使用按钮样式类的最大化标题栏

blocks.html_en: A Helpful Bar using Button Styling Classes

sentences.en: A Helpful Bar using Button Styling Classes
sentences.zh: 使用按钮样式类的有用栏

blocks.html_en: Maximize buttons can be disabled, useful when making a window appear as if it cannot be maximized.

sentences.en: Maximize buttons can be disabled, useful when making a window appear as if it cannot be maximized.
sentences.zh: 可以禁用最大化按钮，这在使窗口看起来好像无法最大化时很有用。

sentences.en: A Title Bar with Maximize disabled
sentences.zh: 禁用最大化的标题栏

blocks.html_en: You can make a title bar "inactive" by adding inactive class, useful when making more than one window.

sentences.en: You can make a title bar "inactive" by adding inactive class, useful when making more than one window.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过添加非活动类来使标题栏“非活动”，这在创建多个窗口时很有用。

sentences.en: An inactive title bar
sentences.zh: 非活动标题栏

sentences.en: Window contents
sentences.zh: 窗口内容

blocks.html_en: Every window has a boundary that defines its shape.

sentences.en: Every window has a boundary that defines its shape.
sentences.zh: 每个窗口都有一个定义其形状的边界。

blocks.html_en: To give our title bar a home, we make use of the window class. This provides a raised outer and inner border, as well as some padding. We can freely resize the window by specifying a width in the container style.

sentences.en: To give our title bar a home, we make use of the window class.
sentences.zh: 为了给我们的标题栏一个家，我们使用窗口类。

sentences.en: This provides a raised outer and inner border, as well as some padding.
sentences.zh: 这提供了凸起的外边框和内边框，以及一些填充。

sentences.en: We can freely resize the window by specifying a width in the container style.

content_html_zh:
用于构建旧 UI 的忠实再现的设计系统。

Intro

98.css 是一个 CSS 库，用于构建类似于 Windows 98 的界面。 在 GitHub 上查看更多内容。

我的第一个 VB4 程序

你好世界！

该库依赖于语义 HTML 的使用。 要制作按钮，您需要使用 <button>。 输入元素需要标签。 图标按钮依赖于 aria-label。 本页面将引导您完成该过程，但可访问性是该项目的主要目标。

您可以覆盖元素的许多样式，同时保持此库提供的外观。 您的按钮需要更多填充吗？ 大胆试试吧。 需要为您的输入标签添加一些颜色吗？ 成为我们的客人。

这个库不包含任何 JavaScript，它只是使用一些 CSS 来设置 HTML 的样式。 这意味着 98.css 与您选择的前端框架兼容。

这是与 React 一起使用的 98.css 示例，以及与普通 JavaScript 一起使用的示例。 使用 98.css 最快的方法是从 unpkg 导入它。

<link
  rel="stylesheet"
  href="https://unpkg.com/98.css"
>

您可以从 GitHub 发布页面或 npm 安装 98.css。

npm install 98.css

成分

按钮

命令按钮也称为下压按钮，是一种当用户单击它时使应用程序执行某些操作的控件。

标准按钮宽 75 像素，高 23 像素，具有凸起的外边框和内边框。 默认情况下，它们的水平内边距为 12 像素。

Show code 
<button>Click me</button>
<input type="submit" />
<input type="reset" />

您可以将类默认值添加到任何按钮以应用附加样式，这在向用户传达如果在 Windows 98 上按下 Enter 键时在活动窗口中将发生什么默认操作时非常有用。

Show code 
<button class="default">OK</button>

单击按钮时，凸起的边框会凹陷。 以下按钮被模拟为处于按下（活动）状态。

Show code 
<button>I am being pressed</button>

禁用按钮保持相同的凸起边框，但其标签具有“褪色”外观。

Show code 
<button disabled>I cannot be clicked</button>

按钮焦点通过虚线边框进行传达，在按钮内容内设置 4px。 下面模拟一下例子来重点说明一下。

Show code 
<button>I am focused</button>

复选框

复选框代表独立或非排他性的选择。

复选框用凹陷面板表示，选择时会填充一个“检查”图标，旁边有一个指示选择的标签。

注意：您必须在复选框后包含相应的标签，使用 <label> 元素以及指向输入 id 的 for 属性。 这确保了复选框易于与辅助技术一起使用，同时确保为所有人提供良好的用户体验（使用 Tab 键导航，能够单击整个标签来选择该框）。

这是一个复选框

Show code 
<input type="checkbox" id="example1">
<label for="example1">This is a checkbox</label>

可以使用标准的选中和禁用属性来选择和禁用复选框。

对输入进行分组时，将每个输入包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中。 这确保了输入之间的间距一致。

我被检查了

我不活跃

我不活跃但仍检查过

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked type="checkbox" id="example2">
  <label for="example2">I am checked</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input disabled type="checkbox" id="example3">
  <label for="example3">I am inactive</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked disabled type="checkbox" id="example4">
  <label for="example4">I am inactive but still checked</label>
</div>

选项按钮

选项按钮（也称为单选按钮）表示一组有限的互斥选项中的单个选项。 也就是说，用户只能选择一组选项。

选项按钮可以通过输入元素上的单选类型来使用。

可以通过在每个输入上指定共享名称属性来对选项按钮进行分组。 就像以前一样：对输入进行分组时，将每个输入包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中，以确保输入之间的间距一致。

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio5" type="radio" name="first-example">
  <label for="radio5">Yes</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio6" type="radio" name="first-example">
  <label for="radio6">No</label>
</div>

选项按钮也可以通过其相应的 HTML 属性进行检查和禁用。

花生酱应该是光滑的

我明白为什么人们喜欢脆脆的花生酱

脆脆的花生酱也不错

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <input id="radio7" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio7">Peanut butter should be smooth</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input checked disabled id="radio8" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio8">I understand why people like crunchy peanut butter</label>
</div>
<div class="field-row">
  <input disabled id="radio9" type="radio" name="second-example">
  <label for="radio9">Crunchy peanut butter is good</label>
</div>

分组框

组框是一种特殊的控件，可用于组织一组控件。 组框是一个矩形框架，带有围绕一组控件的可选标签。

可以通过使用 fieldset 标签包装元素来使用组框。 它包含一个凹陷的外边框和一个凸起的内边框，类似于控件周围的雕刻框。

Show code 
<fieldset>
  <div class="field-row">Select one:</div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio10" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio10">Diners</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio11" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio11">Drive-Ins</label>
  </div>
  <div class="field-row">
    <input id="radio12" type="radio" name="fieldset-example">
    <label for="radio12">Dives</label>
  </div>
</fieldset>

您可以通过在字段集中放置图例元素来为您的组提供标签。

Show code 
<fieldset>

文本框

文本框（也称为编辑控件）是用户输入或编辑文本的矩形控件。 它可以被定义为支持单行或多行文本。

可以通过在输入元素上指定文本类型来呈现文本框。 与复选框和单选按钮一样，您应该提供一个具有正确设置的属性的相应标签，并将两者包装在具有 field-row 类的容器中。

职业

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <label for="text17">Occupation</label>
  <input id="text17" type="text" />
</div>

此外，您可以使用 field-row-stacked 类将标签放置在输入上方而不是旁边。

地址第一行）

地址（第 2 行）

Show code 
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text18">Address (Line 1)</label>
  <input id="text18" type="text" />
</div>
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text19">Address (Line 2)</label>
  <input id="text19" type="text" />
</div>

要支持用户输入中的多行，请改用 textarea 元素。

附加说明

Show code 
<div class="field-row-stacked" style="width: 200px">
  <label for="text20">Additional notes</label>
  <textarea id="text20" rows="8"></textarea>
</div>

文本框也可以被禁用并具有其相应 HTML 属性的值。

最喜欢的颜色

Show code 
<div class="field-row">

  <input id="text21" disabled type="text" value="Windows Green"/>

滑块

滑块有时称为轨迹栏控件，由定义调整程度或范围的条和显示控件当前值的指示器组成...

可以通过在输入元素上指定范围类型来呈现滑块。

成交量：低 高

Show code 
<div class="field-row" style="width: 300px">
  <label for="range22">Volume:</label>
  <label for="range23">Low</label>
  <input id="range23" type="range" min="1" max="11" value="5" />
  <label for="range24">High</label>

您可以使用 has-box-indicator 类将默认指示器替换为框指示器，此外，可以使用 is-vertical 用 div 包裹滑块以垂直显示输入。

注意：要更改垂直滑块的长度，请输入宽度和 div 高度。

考贝尔

Show code 
<div class="field-row">
  <label for="range25">Cowbell</label>
  <div class="is-vertical">

下拉菜单

下拉列表框允许仅从列表中选择单个项目。 在关闭状态下，控件显示控件的当前值。 用户打开列表来更改值。

可以使用 select 和 option 元素呈现下拉菜单。

Show code 
<select>
  <option>5 - Incredible!</option>
  <option>4 - Great!</option>
  <option>3 - Pretty good</option>
  <option>2 - Not so great</option>
  <option>1 - Unfortunate</option>
</select>

默认情况下，将选择第一个选项。 您可以通过为选项元素之一指定选定的属性来更改此设置。

Show code 
<select>
  <option>5 - Incredible!</option>
  <option>4 - Great!</option>
  <option selected>3 - Pretty good</option>
  <option>2 - Not so great</option>
  <option>1 - Unfortunate</option>
</select>

窗户

以下组件说明了如何使用 98.css 构建完整的窗口。

标题栏

标题栏位于窗口顶部边缘的边框内部（也称为标题或标题栏），它延伸到窗口的宽度。 标题栏标识窗口的内容。
在标题栏中包含与主窗口的常用命令关联的命令按钮。 这些按钮充当特定窗口命令的快捷方式。

您可以使用三个类（标题栏、标题栏文本和标题栏控件）构建完整的标题栏。

<script>
  document.querySelectorAll('table.interactive').forEach(element => {
    element.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
      const highlightedClass = 'highlighted';
      const isRow = element => element.tagName === 'TR' && element.parentElement.tagName === 'TBODY';
      const newlySelectedRow = event.composedPath().find(isRow);
      const previouslySelectedRow = Array.from(newlySelectedRow.parentElement.children).filter(isRow).find(element => element.classList.contains(highlightedClass));
      if(previouslySelectedRow){
        previouslySelectedRow.classList.toggle(highlightedClass);
      }

      if (newlySelectedRow) {
        newlySelectedRow.classList.toggle(highlightedClass);
      }
    })
  });
</script>

    田野边界

    文本框、复选框、下拉列表框、旋转框和列表框使用字段边框样式。 您还可以使用该样式来定义窗口内的工作区域。 它采用外凹式和内凹式的基本边框样式。 对于大多数控件，字段内部使用按钮突出显示颜色。 对于文本字段（例如文本框和组合框），当字段为只读或禁用时，内部使用按钮面颜色。
    状态字段使用状态字段边框样式。 此样式仅使用下沉式外基本边框样式。 您可以在状态栏和其他只读字段中使用状态字段样式，其中文件的内容可以动态更改。

    正如这些指南中提到的，这些样式不仅用于表单元素和状态字段，还用于其他上下文，例如指示工作区域和动态内容。 因此，我们为这些通用用法提供了三个类：field-border、field-border-disabled 和 status-field-border。 这些类仅定义边框和背景颜色以及最小填充，因此您通常至少需要自己提供一些额外的填充。
